    def _apply_theme(root, theme):
        theme = theme or {}
        background = theme.get("background", "#202124")
        foreground = theme.get("foreground", "#f1f3f4")
        accent = theme.get("accent", "#4f8cff")
        panel_bg = theme.get("panel_bg", "#2b2f36")
        selection = theme.get("selection", accent)
        root.configure(bg=background)
        root.option_add("*Listbox*Background", panel_bg)
        root.option_add("*Listbox*Foreground", foreground)
        root.option_add("*Listbox*selectBackground", selection)
        root.option_add("*Listbox*selectForeground", foreground)
        style = ttk.Style(root)
        if "clam" in style.theme_names():
            style.theme_use("clam")
        style.configure(".", background=panel_bg, foreground=foreground)
        style.configure("TFrame", background=panel_bg)
        style.configure("TLabel", background=panel_bg, foreground=foreground)
        style.configure("TButton", background=accent, foreground=foreground)
        style.map("TButton", background=[("active", selection)])


    def run_headless(runtime):
    return {"status": "headless", "health": runtime.health(), "services": runtime.list_services()}

def _apply_theme(root, theme):
    theme = theme or {}
    background = theme.get("background", "#202124")
    foreground = theme.get("foreground", "#f1f3f4")
    accent = theme.get("accent", "#4f8cff")
    panel_bg = theme.get("panel_bg", "#2b2f36")
    selection = theme.get("selection", accent)
    root.configure(bg=background)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*Background", panel_bg)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*Foreground", foreground)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*selectBackground", selection)
    root.option_add("*Listbox*selectForeground", foreground)
    style = ttk.Style(root)
    if "clam" in style.theme_names():
        style.theme_use("clam")
    style.configure(".", background=panel_bg, foreground=foreground)
    style.configure("TFrame", background=panel_bg)
    style.configure("TLabel", background=panel_bg, foreground=foreground)
    style.configure("TButton", background=accent, foreground=foreground)
    style.map("TButton", background=[("active", selection)])


def run_headless(runtime):
    return {"status": "headless", "health": runtime.health(), "services": runtime.list_services()}
